data.title: How To Earn $500 A Month From Oracle Stock Ahead Of Q2 Earnings
data.description: Oracle Corporation (NYSE: ORCL) will release Q2 FY2025 results on Dec. 9, with analysts expecting $1.48 EPS and $14.12B revenue. To earn $500 monthly from dividends, an investor would need to own $698,400 worth of ORCL or 3,750 shares.

data.title: Jim Cramer Makes Ralph Lauren Prediction, SoundHound AI Finally 'Broke Out'
data.description: On CNBC's "Mad Money Lightning Round," Jim Cramer said he likes Ralph Lauren, which reported better-than-expected earnings.
